How it works in plain English: You send me your car details. I get you an estimated Carvana or CarMax quote — a baseline floor price to work from. Then I find a private buyer who pays more, arrange the meetup, and you close the deal directly face-to-face. I never touch your money, your title, or your car. My only cut is 20% of the extra I generate for you above that quote.

The Process
How It Works

You send me the details. I handle everything else — the quote, the listing, the buyer — until money is in your pocket.

1

Send me your car details

Year, make, model, mileage, and condition. That’s all I need to get started — no appraisal visit, no running around.

2

I get your estimated floor price

I submit your car details to Carvana and CarMax and come back to you with an estimated quote. Keep in mind appraisals can vary — this is a baseline, not a guarantee. If I can’t beat it privately, you take it — you owe me nothing.

Free, no commitment
3

I find a private buyer

I list the car, handle all inquiries, and vet serious buyers — targeting $1,000–$5,000+ above your dealer quote.

4

You meet, you close

I arrange the meetup at a safe location. The buyer brings cash or a cashier’s check, you sign the title and hand over the keys. All money goes directly to you.

You keep full control
5

You pay my commission

After you receive payment, you send me 20% of the profit above the original dealer quote. Only on the extra — never on the base price.

What I do — and what I never do

Full transparency on my role so there are zero surprises.

What I handle

Getting your Carvana / CarMax quote
Listing, photos, and ad copy
Fielding buyer inquiries
Vetting and qualifying serious buyers
Negotiating the private sale price
Arranging a safe meetup location

What I never do

Take possession of your car
Handle, hold, or transfer any cash
Sign or hold the title
Act as a dealer or licensed broker
Charge any upfront fees
Earn anything if no sale is made
Why It Makes Sense
A Few Extra Thousand, For Free

The average private sale beats a dealer trade-in by $1,500–$5,000. That money was always yours — dealers just kept it. I get it back for you.

💰

Real extra money in your pocket

Private buyers pay what a car is actually worth. On our 5 deals, sellers averaged $2,460 more than their Carvana quote — zero extra effort on their end.

🛡️

Low risk — estimated floor to work from

I get you an estimated dealer quote to use as a baseline. Appraisals aren’t always exact, but having that number gives you a reference point before deciding anything.

📋

I do all the work

No listing, no strangers texting you at 11pm, no no-shows. I handle everything until a vetted buyer is standing in front of you with cash.

📊

I track the private market every day

I actively monitor Facebook Marketplace, CarGurus, and Craigslist listings to understand what private buyers are actually paying — which is how I know where your car can sell above the dealer offer.

About Me
Who’s Behind DriveUp
Ray Lau

I’m a college student with a genuine passion for the automotive business and a sharp eye for where dealers leave money on the table. DriveUp started from a simple observation: Carvana and CarMax offers are a starting point — not the ceiling. Private buyers almost always pay significantly more.

I handle the entire process from start to finish — getting your dealer quote, building the listing, finding the buyer, and setting up the meetup. You just show up, collect your money, and sign the title. No effort, no stress.

I only make money when I make you money first. That’s the only way this works — and why every seller I’ve worked with has come out ahead.

🎓
College Student
Studying business with a focus on entrepreneurship. DriveUp is my hands-on classroom — every deal teaches me something new about pricing, negotiation, and people.
📉
Active Private Market Researcher
I monitor Facebook Marketplace, CarGurus, and Craigslist daily. I know what private buyers in this area are actually paying — not just what dealers claim cars are worth.
🏆
Incoming Automotive Industry Intern
Starting in the dealership world this May — adding formal industry training on top of the real-world deal experience I’ve already built.
🤝
5 Real Deals, Real Results
Not theory — I’ve done this. Every seller I’ve worked with has walked away with more than their Carvana offer. The track record speaks for itself.
